intro: Build, share & explore! Discovery 2 is a beautiful sandbox game. Now available on Nintendo Switch™!
description:
Create your own world – block by block.
Build houses, villages, or entire cities. Explore underground caves, design electric circuits, and light up your creations with beautiful day & night cycles.

• Creative sandbox gameplay – Over 250 unique blocks & materials.
• Inking system – Color blocks with 16 inks for unique designs.
• Community Gallery – Share worlds & explore creations from players worldwide.
• Electric system – Use wires, switches, sensors and lights to create interactive lighting scenarios.
• Smooth performance – HDR state-of-the-art rendering & up to 60 FPS.
